values.description: PingOne environment UUID — Connections → Environment → Settings
Client ID of BX Finance User app (issues Subject Token via PKCE)
Client ID of BX Finance Banking App (performs Token Exchange #1). Also the value stored in mayAct.sub on user records.
Client Secret of BX Finance Banking App
Client ID of BX Finance MCP Service app (obtains PingOne API Token via Client Credentials)
Client Secret of BX Finance MCP Service app
Subject Token audience — must exactly match BX Finance AI Agent resource server Audience field
MCP Token audience — must exactly match BX Finance MCP Server resource server Audience field
PingOne API Token audience — fixed value for PingOne Management API
AUTO — populated by Step 1 pre-request script after PKCE login. Token 1 of 3.
AUTO — populated by Step 2 test script after Token Exchange #1. Token 2 of 3.
AUTO — populated by Step 3 test script after Client Credentials grant. Token 3 of 3.
AUTO — populated by Step 1 test script from the sub claim of the Subject Token. Used in Step 4 user lookup URL.
